title: Haste

body:
# About this Modpack:
Haste is a **Minecraft Optimization Modpack** that designed for PojavLauncher\
Aiming to improve performance\
Both for **Forge & Fabric**

## Notice:
**It's NOT COPYIED FROM Aero's project named"Pojav Optimize" in PojavLauncher's Official Discord Server**

## About PojavLauncher:
[PojavLauncher](https://pojavlauncherteam.github.io/) is a flexible, fast and open-source Minecraft Java Edition launcher for Android and iOS.
## Why I made this modpack:
Because of the huge differences between ARM and x86 platform.\
Developers need to transfer API(Application Programming Interface).

### About Graphics:
Developers creat Renderer that unable mobile phones'SoC to render Minecraft\
(Also Renderers are open-source)\
**Graphics Translation is not 100% perfectly,it still have any Errors and Bugs.**\
Also Renderers can't support all the mods(Including some Optimize mods like Sodium ,need patcher).
<details>
<summary>Renderers</summary>

Holy GL4ES-( all versions , fast)

Virgl-(1.7+ only , mid)

Zink (Vulkan)-( all versions,mid)

ANGLE (Vulkan)-(1.17+only,mid)
</details>

### About Java:
Pojav use jre(java run time) build for AArch32/64 or ARM32/64.\
Which support Minecraft.\
And the performances in Arm processor are different from x86 processor.\
So it needs custom mod options.
<details>
<summary>Runtimes</summary>

jre8-arm64-release-8

jre17-arm64-release-17

jre21-arm64-release-21

…
(more)

</details>

## More
**I will make different versions for Renderers**\
e.g.\
Fabric-SodiumReady-Holy\
Forge-OptifineReady-Holy\
Sodium Ready:\
Sodium Based\
Optifine Ready:\
Optifine Based
# Notice
**About Optifine Copyright**:\
Quote from https://optifine.net/copyright \
"It may not be placed on any web site or otherwise distributed publicly without advance written permission."\
**THIS MODPACK DO NOT INCLUDE OPTIFINE MODFILE** \
So you need to Download Optifine From\
https://optifine.net/ \
**and place it to the right filepath by yourself**

**About VulkanMOD:**\
**The VulkanMOD is edited for ARM platform**\
Credits:\
xCollateral's [VulkanMOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) \
sa1672ndo's [VulkanMOD For ARM](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vulkanoptimized-pojav-edition)
